{
  "claims": [
    "The closure of the Banning DMV Field Office would have a significant impact on the residents of the San Gorgonio Pass Area.",
    "The permanent closure of the Banning DMV will severely limit access to essential DMV services for many people.",
    "Traveling to nearby DMV offices can require more than 30 minutes of driving in the San Gorgonio Pass Area.",
    "The San Gorgonio Pass Area is home to over 107,000 people and is predominantly rural and suburban.",
    "Banning and Beaumont are identified as some of the fastest-growing cities in California.",
    "The demand for DMV services in the San Gorgonio Pass Area will increase as the population continues to rise."
